uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds door-mode frame. bytes[0..1]=(11<<8|184)&0x3fff=3000 mV -> 3 V; bit 0x80 clear -> closed; MOD=1; open count=5; last duration=42 min; alarm bit clear. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (BAT_V 3, DOOR_OPEN_STATUS 0, DOOR_OPEN_TIMES 5, LAST_DOOR_OPEN_DURATION 42, ALARM 0) then normalizing.

Synthetic in-bounds door-mode frame. bytes[0]=139 sets bit 0x80 (open); (139<<8|184)&0x3fff=3000 mV -> 3 V; MOD=1; open count=(1<<8|7)=263; last duration=12 min; alarm bit set. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (BAT_V 3, DOOR_OPEN_STATUS 1, DOOR_OPEN_TIMES 263, LAST_DOOR_OPEN_DURATION 12, ALARM 1) then normalizing.
Reference upstream returns 'unknown FPort' on any non-10 port; this module rejects non-10 ports with 'unsupported fPort 42 (expected 10)'.
